title: Boat Hire in Estepona: 2026 Costs, Seasons and Tips
html:
Set sail from Estepona's marina to explore the Costa del Sol's azure waters. Renting a boat here, whether a small motorboat from 250 EUR or a crewed yacht from 1,200 EUR for a day, is straightforward via BoatHire24, a worldwide marketplace for boat hire and listing.

Where to set off in Estepona?

Start your journey from Puerto Deportivo de Estepona, a modern marina with full facilities. Other departure points include the nearby Puerto Banús in Marbella, the historic Sotogrande marina, and the bay of La Duquesa. For day trips, head to the islands of Isla de las Palomas or the unspoilt coves around Manilva.

How much does it cost to rent a boat in Estepona in 2026?

The cost ranges from 50 EUR per person for shared tours up to 2,500 EUR per day for a crewed luxury yacht. For a half-day small motorboat, expect around 300 EUR, while a full-day catamaran for a group can cost from 600 EUR. A crewed Sunseeker or Azimut typically starts at 1,500 EUR per day. You can compare verified boat listings to see the full range; use compare verified boat listings on BoatHire24 to check the latest prices.

Which boat to rent in Estepona?

Choose the right vessel for your group size and activity. Below are popular options available through the platform.

  1. Rigid Inflatable Boat (RIB), ideal for a fast trip to Marbella or for watersports; fits 6 guests; from 250 EUR half-day.
  2. Motorboat (e.g. Axopar 28), versatile for coastal cruising and fishing; sleeps 4; from 300 EUR half-day.
  3. Catamaran (e.g. Lagoon 42), stable and spacious for family days out; up to 12 passengers; from 600 EUR full-day.
  4. Flybridge Yacht (e.g. Princess V58), luxury and comfort with a flybridge; capacity 10; from 1,200 EUR full-day. See the Princess V58 for hire for exact specifications.
  5. Crewed Motor Yacht (e.g. Sunseeker 65), all-inclusive charter with skipper and host; up to 10 guests; from 2,000 EUR per day.

What season is best for boating in Estepona?

The best season runs from April to October, with July and August offering calm Levante winds and warm seas. The high season (June to September) sees consistent weather and water temperatures averaging 24°C. The local Poniente wind can pick up in the afternoon, but marinas like Puerto Deportivo offer shelter. A genuine local tip:

Book a morning slot to enjoy glassy seas before the Poniente breeze arrives by 14:00, especially in July and August.

Do you need a licence to rent a boat in Estepona?

In Spain, a valid boating licence is required for vessels over certain power limits, but many rental boats include a skipper. For cheaper, smaller motorboats (under 15 hp) you may not need one, but the operator confirms exact requirements at booking. Self-drive catamarans and yachts usually require a licence recognised in Spanish waters.

At a glance

  • Price band: 50 EUR shared tour, 2,500 EUR crewed yacht
  • Peak months: July, August
  • Trip length: half-day (4 hours) or full-day (8 hours)
  • Capacity: 6 to 12 guests
  • Currency: EUR
  • Distance: Marbella is 8 nautical miles east from Estepona marina

Questions about boat rental in Estepona

Can I rent a boat for a day without a licence?

Yes, you can hire a boat with a skipper included, which is common for most motor yachts and catamarans on BoatHire24.

How far in advance should I book for the summer?

For a Princess V58 or similar large yacht in August, book at least three months ahead to secure your preferred dates.

Are dogs allowed on the boat?

Some boat owners permit well-behaved dogs, but you must check the specific listing's pet policy before booking.

What is the cancellation policy?

Cancellation policies vary by listing, but many offer free cancellation up to 48 hours before departure; always read the terms on the listing page.

To confirm availability and exact requirements, use the boat search on BoatHire24 to filter by dates, crewed options, and licence requirements.

If you own a boat in Estepona, you can rent out your boat through BoatHire24 and earn income from visitors seeking a unique maritime experience. BoatHire24 is a worldwide marketplace where you can rent a boat in Estepona or list your own.

Written by the BoatHire24 team, who book and list verified boats in Estepona and hundreds of destinations worldwide.
